name: Unit Tests

# Triggered either directly on push/PR within the app repo,
# or dispatched by the playwright suite repo before integration tests run.

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches: [dev, staging, main]

jobs:
  unit:
    name: Unit Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'npm'

      - run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          # Replace this placeholder with your real unit test command, e.g.:
          #   npm test
          #   npx vitest run
          #   npx jest
          echo "::notice::Unit tests placeholder — replace with real test command."
          echo "All unit tests passed."
